Services

Barber services for clean, confident grooming

Quality-focused barbering without fuss. Ask in-store for the right service for your hair, beard, style and maintenance needs.

01

Haircuts

Clean, tidy cuts shaped around your hair, style and day-to-day routine.

02

Skin fades

Sharp fades with careful blending and a neat finish.

03

Beard trims

Shape, tidy and refresh your beard for a cleaner look.

04

Kids cuts

Friendly barber service for younger clients and families.

05

Style refreshes

Freshen up your current style and keep it looking sharp between major cuts.

06

Clean-ups

Neckline, edges and tidy-up work for a cleaner finish.

07

Hair and beard grooming

A complete grooming visit for customers who want their hair and beard looking neat, balanced and well maintained.

Why choose us

A clean local barber shop with attention to detail

Big Boss Barbers is built around skilled barbering, a clean shop environment and a relaxed local vibe. Customers come in for reliable cuts, friendly service and a sharper finish without feeling rushed.

Skilled barbers

Careful cutting, blending and grooming from barbers who take pride in the final result.

Clean and friendly shop

A modern Albany shop with a relaxed atmosphere and a welcoming feel.

Great for adults and kids

Professional service for regular cuts, kids cuts, beard trims and grooming clean-ups.

North Shore location

Conveniently located in Albany on Oteha Valley Road.

Customer reviews

Trusted by local customers

Real customer feedback from people who value a clean shop, friendly service and sharp results.

★★★★★

“Cool place. Owner Abdulla is the most awesome barber. Always listens to what I want, gives clean, sharp cuts, and pays attention to the small details. The shop has a relaxed, friendly vibe and I always walk out feeling fresh and confident. Highly recommend.”

Prasad Bayaty

★★★★★

“Great skills by the barbers and very happy with the final haircuts. The barbers took their time and really ensured it was perfect rather than being rushed through like some other places we have been to. Lovely, clean shop. Will definitely be going back again.”

Fiona Wills

★★★★★

“Took my son to this barbershop for the first time and we’re really happy with the haircut. They did a great job. The service was excellent, everyone was friendly, and the place is clean with a really nice vibe. We’ll definitely be coming back again.”

Vivi L

★★★★★

“The shop owner is very friendly and has excellent hairdressing skills. I haven’t even experienced this style in China. They even have a desk in the shop. It’s so cool.”

刘畅

★★★★★

“I came in with a half-finished botched haircut and Ahmed did an amazing job of blending it in. They far exceeded my expectations and recommended a style that worked better for me than what I was thinking of getting. Priced reasonably for the quality you get. Definitely recommend for anyone looking for a good reliable barber or hairdresser that is reasonably priced on the North Shore.”

Sairaj Lal
